assumptions.text: Client will facilitate timely access to key stakeholders, decision-makers, and subject matter experts as needed throughout the engagement.
Client will provide reasonable access to relevant internal documents, communications materials, and background information required for assessment and strategy development.
Project scope, timeline, and pricing are based on the information provided in the client brief. Material changes to scope, stakeholder landscape, or strategic context may require a change order.
Travel and accommodation expenses, if required for stakeholder meetings or on-site work, will be billed at cost with prior client approval. Remote delivery is the default where feasible.

All parties will adhere to strict confidentiality regarding engagement details, strategic advice, and stakeholder intelligence. Duke Strategies will not disclose the engagement or client identity without prior written consent.
Timelines assume client review and approval of deliverables within 5 business days of submission. Delays in client feedback may impact overall project timelines.

disclaimers.text: Stakeholder engagement outcomes, reputation metrics, and strategic impact projections are based on our professional judgment and comparable engagements. Actual outcomes may vary depending on stakeholder responses, market conditions, political developments, and organizational execution.
This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of submission. After this period, pricing and team availability are subject to reconfirmation.
Recommendations regarding third-party service providers, media outlets, or technology platforms are based on our independent professional assessment and do not constitute a commercial endorsement.

legalTerms.title: Intellectual Property
legalTerms.text: All deliverables created specifically for this engagement become the client's property upon final payment. Duke Strategies retains ownership of pre-existing methodologies, frameworks, tools, and analytical platforms, granting the client a perpetual, non-exclusive license for internal use.

legalTerms.title: Confidentiality
legalTerms.text: Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of all proprietary and sensitive information disclosed during the engagement, including stakeholder intelligence, strategic advice, and internal communications. This obligation survives for 5 years following engagement completion.

legalTerms.title: Limitation of Liability
legalTerms.text: Duke Strategies' total aggregate liability under this engagement shall not exceed two times (2x) the total fees paid. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, incidental, or punitive damages.

legalTerms.title: Termination
legalTerms.text: Either party may terminate this engagement with 14 calendar days' written notice. Upon termination, the client shall pay for all work completed to date. Deliverables and stakeholder intelligence produced to date shall be transferred to the client.

legalTerms.title: Change Management
legalTerms.text: Changes to project scope, timeline, or deliverables require a written change order agreed by both parties. Change orders will specify the impact on fees, timeline, and deliverables.
